'''Kvarm Jia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] circa [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. At the bidding of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], he convened the [[Corruption Panel]] that investigated [[Viqi Shesh]] prior to the [[Peace Vote|Appeasement Vote]].<ref name="Recovery" /> He also sat on the [[New Republic Military Oversight Committee]].<ref name="SBS">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>
